reasoning: Allyl glycidyl ether contains an epoxide (oxirane) ring connected via an ether linkage to an allyl group. The defining structural feature is the three-membered cyclic ether (epoxide), making it best classified under the Epoxides class.
substance_name: allyl glycidyl ether; allyl 2,3-epoxypropyl ether; prop-2-en-1-yl 2,3-epoxypropyl ether
